summarization.a: The line chart illustrates the mass change over time at 300°C on Al₂O₃, showing a stepwise average decrease in mass.

a.question: How much is the average mass change per cycle?
Why is there a mass increase after an HF exposure?
a.answer: CH3 has an atomic mass of 15 amu, F has an atomic mass of 19 amuu. So the replacement of a singel CH3 group with a F atom increases the mass with 4 amu.

a.question: How long does a single cycle take?
Is the effect every cycle the same?
a.answer: Based on the few shown cycles it seems that the mass changes are constant for the different cycles.
